architecture.description: A responsive web application providing current weather, hourly forecast, and daily forecast, with location search capabilities.

endpoints.description: Fetches current weather conditions for a specified location (e.g., city name or lat/lon) via OpenWeatherMap API proxy.
Fetches hourly weather forecast for a specified location via OpenWeatherMap API proxy.
Fetches daily weather forecast for a specified location via OpenWeatherMap API proxy.
Searches for geographical locations based on a query string.

pages.name: Weather Display
pages.description: Main page displaying current weather, hourly forecast, daily forecast, and providing location search functionality.

assumptions: Application type assumed to be a responsive web application.
Key features assumed to be current weather, hourly forecast, daily forecast, and location search.
Weather data source assumed to be OpenWeatherMap API.
Target audience assumed to be general users seeking quick access to local and searched weather information.
UI assumed to be clean, intuitive, and mobile-responsive.
Units of measurement assumed to be user-selectable, defaulting to metric (Celsius, km/h).
Backend assumed to handle API key proxying and basic caching for performance and security.
No user accounts or complex persistent data storage requiring a database are assumed.
No user authentication is assumed as there are no user accounts.
Styling assumed to be a modern, neutral color scheme with a light mode default.
